mapper.select:
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM engine_label
project_id != #{project_id}
SELECT t1.`name`,t2.`merge` from (SELECT DISTINCT `name` from engine_label) t1 LEFT JOIN train_label t2 on t1.`name`=t2.`name` Where t2.`merge` is null

SELECT DISTINCT project_id from engine_label WHERE name in
#{item}
